create.subtitle: Define a new role and assign permissions

errors.TOKEN_INVALID: Your session is invalid. Please log in again.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.USER_INACTIVE: Your account has been deactivated. Contact an administrator.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.ROLE_CODE_EXISTS: A role with this code already exists.
errors.ROLE_IS_CONST: System roles cannot be modified or deleted.
errors.UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.API_TIMEOUT: The request timed out. The AI model is processing a large dataset — please try again.
errors.API_NETWORK: Cannot connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.API_SERVER: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register to access the affiliate dashboard
register.successMessage: Account created successfully! Redirecting to login…
register.validationRequired: Username, email and password are required.
register.validationUsername: Username must be at least 3 characters.
register.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
register.validationPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

affiliate.title: Affiliate Programs
affiliate.subtitle: Browse and manage crawled affiliate programs
affiliate.bulkLlmImproveConfirm: Re-crawl and improve {count} selected program(s) with LLM?

verify.notePlaceholder: Describe what's incorrect or needs improvement…
verify.title: Verify: {domain}

export.title: Choose columns to export
export.hint: Domain is always included. Uncheck any columns you don't need.
export.hintSelected: Exporting {count} selected domain(s). Domain is always included.
export.maxRowsHint: Leave empty to export all matching rows, up to the limit.
export.rowCapExceeded: Too many rows to export ({total}, max {maxRows}). Narrow your filters and try again.

llmAudit.title: LLM Audit
llmAudit.subtitle: Compare affiliate data quality before and after LLM enrichment

affiliateActions.title: Affiliate Actions
affiliateActions.subtitle: Trigger crawls, discover programs, and manage affiliate data

startCrawl.title: Start Batch Crawl
startCrawl.description: Run the scheduled crawl across all pending domains in the queue.
startCrawl.limitHint: Maximum number of domains to crawl this run. Leave blank = unlimited.
startCrawl.forceHint: Re-crawl even if domain was recently crawled.

discoverGoogle.title: Discover from Google
discoverGoogle.description: Search Google to discover new affiliate program domains. Supports multiple keywords — one per line.
discoverGoogle.keywordsPlaceholder:
saas affiliate program
recurring commission software
email marketing affiliate
discoverGoogle.keywordsHint: Enter one keyword per line. System will search Google for each and collect domains. Leave blank = use system default keywords.
discoverGoogle.limitHint: Max domains to collect per search. Leave blank = system default.
discoverGoogle.jobDone: Polling stopped after 10 min. Crawl may still be running in background.

discoverSources.title: Discover from Tiered Sources
discoverSources.description: Crawl built-in tiered sources (PartnerStack, ShareASale, Impact, etc.) to find new programs. No configuration needed — run immediately.

freshnessReset.title: Freshness Reset
freshnessReset.description: Mark stale domains for priority re-crawl in the next run.
freshnessReset.staleDaysHint: Domains not re-crawled after X days will be marked stale. Leave blank = system default.

crawlDomain.title: Crawl Single Domain
crawlDomain.description: Immediately crawl a specific domain and save results to the database.
crawlDomain.domainHint: Enter domain only — no http:// or path.
crawlDomain.forceHint: Re-crawl even if domain already has recent data.

crawlDomains.title: Crawl Multiple Domains
crawlDomains.description: Queue multiple domains for batch crawl — one domain per line.
crawlDomains.domainsHint: One plain domain per line (no https://). Blank lines are ignored.
crawlDomains.forceHint: Re-crawl all even if they have recent data.

upsert.title: Add / Update Affiliate Program
upsert.description: Manually create or overwrite an affiliate program record. Only Domain is required — all other fields are optional.
upsert.domainHint: Main domain of the program (no http://).
upsert.programNameHint: Display name of the affiliate program.
upsert.signupUrlHint: Registration link. Must start with https://.
upsert.commissionRateHint: Rate or fixed amount as free text.
upsert.recurringDurationHint: How long recurring commissions last (Recurring type only).
upsert.cookieDaysHint: Tracking cookie lifespan in days. Longer = more chances to earn commission.
upsert.confidenceHint: Data confidence from 0 to 1. E.g. 0.9 = very certain, 0.3 = unverified.

crawlFromLinks.title: Crawl from Website Links
crawlFromLinks.description: Fetch domain list from the websites/links API, preview, then crawl.
crawlFromLinks.forceHint: Re-crawl even if data is recent.

improveLowScore.title: AI Improve Low-Score (Sequential)
improveLowScore.description: Fetch all programs below the score threshold and run LLM improvement one by one in order.
improveLowScore.thresholdHint: Programs with affiliateScore below this value will be queued.
improveLowScore.ladyToolsHint: Lady Tools opens a real Chrome tab per domain (~20s each) and reuses the domain's best stored sub-page content instead of re-crawling. Domains that still score 0 will be deleted.

feedback.title: Feedback & Suggestions
feedback.subtitle: Share your thoughts to help us improve

manage.title: Manage Feedback
manage.subtitle: Review and act on user feedback

proxy.title: Proxy Management
proxy.subtitle: Monitor and manage your proxy pool

proxyActions.title: Proxy Actions
proxyActions.subtitle: Import, health-check, and clean up your proxy pool

healthCheck.title: Full Health Check
healthCheck.description: Test all proxies in the database and update their live/dead status. This runs against the full pool and may take several minutes.
healthCheck.confirm: Run a full health check on all proxies in the database? This may take a while.

deleteDead.title: Delete Dead Proxies
deleteDead.description: Remove all proxies marked as dead from the database to clean up the pool.
deleteDead.confirm: Delete ALL dead proxies from the database?

bulkDelete.title: Bulk Delete by IP:Port
bulkDelete.description: Enter specific proxies to remove (one ip:port per line).

config.title: System Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage API keys, LLM models, crawl parameters, and table defaults

sections.apiKeysDesc: Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini and Google Search credentials
sections.llmModelsDesc: Ollama URL, Gemini API key, tier model assignments, and extraction toggle
sections.llmThresholdsDesc: Score and confidence cutoffs for automatic model selection
sections.crawlRetryDesc: Conditions that trigger a re-crawl with LLM enrichment
sections.googleScraperDesc: Anti-CAPTCHA timing and respawn limits for Google discovery
sections.tableDefaultsDesc: Default page size and available options for each data table

fields.anthropicModelHint: Model used for LLM extraction (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)
fields.geminiApiKeyHint: Google Generative AI key — used for free Gemini models (gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-2.0-flash-exp). Cached 60 s, no restart required.
fields.googleCseCxHint: Custom Search Engine ID from Google
fields.ollamaUrlHint: Base URL of the local Ollama instance
fields.ollamaModelLowHint: Used when score ≤ LOW threshold — heavier model for sparse data
fields.ollamaModelMidHint: Used when score is between LOW and MID thresholds
fields.enableLlmExtractHint: When on, LLM is called if regex extraction yields no commission data
fields.affiliateRetryScoreMaxHint: Domains with score ≤ this value are eligible for re-crawl
fields.affiliateRetryConfMaxHint: Domains with confidence ≤ this value are eligible for re-crawl
fields.affiliateMaxCrawlRetriesHint: Maximum number of re-crawl attempts before a domain is flagged
fields.subpagePenaltyThresholdHint: If avg sub-page score is below this value, the parent domain score is penalized. Default: 50
fields.llmTierScoreMidHint: Score between LOW and this → use Model MID; above → skip LLM
fields.llmTierConfMidHint: Confidence between LOW and this → use Model MID
fields.googleScrapePageDelayMsHint: Wait between paginated result pages within one query
fields.googleScrapeQueryDelayMinMsHint: Min wait between different query keywords
fields.googleScrapeQueryDelayMaxMsHint: Max wait between different query keywords — larger = fewer CAPTCHAs
fields.googleScrapeCaptchaRespawnHint: Respawn browser with fresh session after N consecutive CAPTCHAs
fields.googleScrapeMaxRespawnsHint: Hard limit on total respawns — exceeded → stop to avoid overload
fields.googleScrapeMaxPagesHint: Maximum number of result pages to scrape per keyword (default: 10)
fields.googleScrapeProxyQuarantineMsHint: Quarantine duration for a proxy after Google flags it

table.availablePageSizesHint: Comma-separated list of options shown in the per-page selector (e.g. 20,50,100,200)

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage accounts and role assignments
users.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
users.deleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.

affiliateStats.title: Affiliate Statistics
affiliateStats.subtitle: Charts and distribution breakdowns for affiliate programs
